replaceable.minimum_retention: until no active or planned run references the asset

non_reproducible.minimum_retention: through dependent analysis, paper evidence freeze, and an approved durability review
non_reproducible.cleanup_authority: explicit checkpoint/result index and owner approval

temporary.minimum_retention: until the owning transaction is committed or diagnosed
temporary.cleanup_authority: exact paths recorded by the owning transaction

protections: Never clean an active run or an object with a live lock or process
Never clean .part or lock metadata without checking the owning process and lease
Resolve every cleanup target and prove it is inside DATA_ROOT
Delete checkpoints only by immutable checkpoint ID after reference checks
Do not mix Git GC, system log cleanup, or other-project maintenance into this policy
